news.title:
Jyoti CNC Automation reported a consolidated Q3 FY26 revenue growth of 28.1% at INR 576 crores, with EBITDA margins improving to 26.8%.
The company plans to expand its manufacturing capacity in India to 16,000 machines by Sept 2026 and targets growth in aerospace, defense, and semiconductor sectors.
news.summary:
Jyoti CNC Automation reported a consolidated Q3 FY26 revenue growth of 28.1% at INR 576 crores, with EBITDA margins improving to 26.8%.
The company plans to expand its manufacturing capacity in India to 16,000 machines by Sept 2026 and targets growth in aerospace, defense, and semiconductor sectors.

news.title:
Jyoti CNC aims for 16,000 machines/year capacity by Sept 2026.
It holds a robust order book worth Rs.4,585 crore.
news.summary:
Jyoti CNC aims for 16,000 machines/year capacity by Sept 2026.
It holds a robust order book worth Rs.4,585 crore.

news.title:
Infomerics reaffirmed Jyoti CNC's long-term rating at IVR A (Stable) and short-term at IVR A1.
The ratings cover bank facilities totaling Rs 1259.1 crores, reflecting stable creditworthiness.
news.summary:
Infomerics reaffirmed Jyoti CNC's long-term rating at IVR A (Stable) and short-term at IVR A1.
The ratings cover bank facilities totaling Rs 1259.1 crores, reflecting stable creditworthiness.

news.title:
Jyoti CNC's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹1.54B from ₹1.04B YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 26.8% from 23.0% YoY.
news.summary:
Jyoti CNC's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹1.54B from ₹1.04B YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 26.8% from 23.0% YoY.

news.title:
Jyoti CNC Automation's board meeting on Feb 10, 2026, to approve financial results.
Standalone and consolidated results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025, to be discussed.
news.summary:
Jyoti CNC Automation's board meeting on Feb 10, 2026, to approve financial results.
Standalone and consolidated results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025, to be discussed.

news.title:
Jyoti CNC Automation Ltd appoints Mrs. Prafulla P. Shenoy as Independent Director, effective Jan 19, 2026.
Mrs. Shenoy brings 36 years of experience in IDBI, SIDBI, treasury, and institutional finance roles.
news.summary:
Jyoti CNC Automation Ltd appoints Mrs. Prafulla P. Shenoy as Independent Director, effective Jan 19, 2026.
Mrs. Shenoy brings 36 years of experience in IDBI, SIDBI, treasury, and institutional finance roles.

news.title:
Jyoti CNC Automation plans ₹10,000 Cr investment in 5 years for high-speed CNC machines.
The investment targets aerospace, defense, electronics, and semiconductor manufacturing sectors.
news.summary:
Jyoti CNC Automation plans ₹10,000 Cr investment in 5 years for high-speed CNC machines.
The investment targets aerospace, defense, electronics, and semiconductor manufacturing sectors.

news.title:
Jyoti CNC Automation Ltd informs about an analyst/investor meet on Dec 5, 2025.
The meeting will occur at the Rajkot plant, discussing publicly available information.
news.summary:
Jyoti CNC Automation Ltd informs about an analyst/investor meet on Dec 5, 2025.
The meeting will occur at the Rajkot plant, discussing publicly available information.

news.title:
Jyoti CNC's subsidiary, Huron Graffenstanden SAS, opened a new facility in France.
The facility is within existing premises; announcement made on Nov 19, 2025.
news.summary:
Jyoti CNC's subsidiary, Huron Graffenstanden SAS, opened a new facility in France.
The facility is within existing premises; announcement made on Nov 19, 2025.

news.title:
Jyoti CNC faces a tax demand of ₹44.6 Cr for alleged e-way bill non-compliance.
Order received on Nov 17, 2025; company consulting legal and tax experts.
news.summary:
Jyoti CNC faces a tax demand of ₹44.6 Cr for alleged e-way bill non-compliance.
Order received on Nov 17, 2025; company consulting legal and tax experts.

news.title:
Jyoti CNC Automation Ltd hosted its Q2 and H1 FY26 Earnings Call, reporting strong revenue growth: Rs. 508 crores for Q2 and Rs. 918 crores for H1 FY26.
Company targets expanding production capacity to 16,000 machines/year by Sep 2026 and aims for 30-35% CAGR growth leveraging strong R&D and order book of Rs. 4,546 crores.
news.summary:
Jyoti CNC Automation Ltd hosted its Q2 and H1 FY26 Earnings Call, reporting strong revenue growth: Rs. 508 crores for Q2 and Rs. 918 crores for H1 FY26.
Company targets expanding production capacity to 16,000 machines/year by Sep 2026 and aims for 30-35% CAGR growth leveraging strong R&D and order book of Rs. 4,546 crores.

news.title:
Jyoti CNC expects 4-5% margin boost via in-house controllers, drives, motors.
It maintains a 40-60 split, excelling in Q3/Q4 performance traditionally.
news.summary:
Jyoti CNC expects 4-5% margin boost via in-house controllers, drives, motors.
It maintains a 40-60 split, excelling in Q3/Q4 performance traditionally.

news.title:
Jyoti CNC expects 30-35% growth backed by a ₹4,546 Cr order book.
The order book ensures revenue visibility for 24-30 months.
news.summary:
Jyoti CNC expects 30-35% growth backed by a ₹4,546 Cr order book.
The order book ensures revenue visibility for 24-30 months.

news.title:
Jyoti CNC Automation operates steadily across automotive, aerospace, defense, and engineering sectors.
Capacity at 88%; INR 4,546 Cr order book; Tumakuru 20-acre expansion approved for growth.
news.summary:
Jyoti CNC Automation operates steadily across automotive, aerospace, defense, and engineering sectors.
Capacity at 88%; INR 4,546 Cr order book; Tumakuru 20-acre expansion approved for growth.

news.title:
Jyoti CNC Q2 sales rose to INR 5,079M from INR 4,306.7M YoY; net income up to INR 855M vs INR 758.8M.
Six-month sales reached INR 9,180.7M, net income INR 1,569.2M; EPS increased to INR 6.9 vs INR 5.57 YoY.
news.summary:
Jyoti CNC Q2 sales rose to INR 5,079M from INR 4,306.7M YoY; net income up to INR 855M vs INR 758.8M.
Six-month sales reached INR 9,180.7M, net income INR 1,569.2M; EPS increased to INR 6.9 vs INR 5.57 YoY.
